summary: Iteration 115 - Auth CORS Fix Testing Complete. All auth flows verified working: (1) Email/password login returns session_token in response body, (2) Bearer token auth works for /api/auth/me and protected endpoints, (3) Registration returns session_token and redirects to dashboard, (4) Logout works correctly, (5) Google OAuth button exists and points to correct Emergent auth URL. The CORS fix (removing withCredentials=true, using Bearer tokens from localStorage) is working correctly.

backend_api_tests.login_returns_session_token: PASS - POST /api/auth/login returns session_token in body
backend_api_tests.auth_me_with_bearer: PASS - GET /api/auth/me works with Authorization: Bearer token
backend_api_tests.auth_me_without_token: PASS - Returns 401 when no token provided
backend_api_tests.register_returns_session_token: PASS - POST /api/auth/register returns session_token in body
backend_api_tests.cases_with_bearer: PASS - GET /api/cases works with Bearer token

frontend_ui_tests.sign_in_modal_opens: PASS - Auth modal opens on Sign In click
frontend_ui_tests.email_password_login: PASS - Login with djkingy79@gmail.com redirects to /dashboard
frontend_ui_tests.dashboard_loads: PASS - Dashboard shows user's cases (3 cases found)
frontend_ui_tests.logout_flow: PASS - Sign Out redirects to landing page
frontend_ui_tests.google_signin_button: PASS - Google Sign In button visible with correct text
frontend_ui_tests.registration_form: PASS - Registration form shows name/email/password fields
frontend_ui_tests.registration_flow: PASS - New user registration redirects to terms acceptance

cors_fix_verification.withCredentials_removed: VERIFIED - axios.defaults.withCredentials not set in App.js
cors_fix_verification.bearer_interceptor: VERIFIED - axios interceptor adds Authorization: Bearer from localStorage
cors_fix_verification.session_token_storage: VERIFIED - AuthModal stores session_token in localStorage
cors_fix_verification.auth_callback_storage: VERIFIED - AuthCallback stores session_token in localStorage

context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth CORS fix verified in iteration 115. The fix removed axios.defaults.withCredentials=true and now uses Bearer tokens from localStorage exclusively. Login/register endpoints return session_token in response body. AuthCallback and AuthModal both store tokens in localStorage. All auth flows working: email/password login, registration, logout, Bearer token auth for protected routes. Google OAuth button exists but full flow requires real Google account.
